Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh", sum(bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs.state = 'CO') 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/0df24aa3c5a31c9ac2e7087df92a6dcdd12e7f4583385522565185a6fe556891/e6beb631-95d2-4cbb-9288-d584fad89c77/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
